metadata.description: Single-plugin self-marketplace. The repo IS the marketplace; the same repo IS the plugin (root contains both .claude-plugin/marketplace.json and .claude-plugin/plugin.json).

plugins.name: insights-share
plugins.description: Team-wide insight sharing for Claude Code instances. Auto-injects relevant prior lessons into every prompt, ships a beautiful statusline, and force-installs itself in collaborator repos via append-only CLAUDE.md.
